items.title: src Layout
items.description: `[tool.setuptools.packages.find] where = ['src']` tells the build backend the package lives under `src/`.

items.title: Reusable Modules
items.description: Modules become installable distributions through `pyproject.toml`'s build configuration.

items.title: CLI Tools
items.description: `[project.scripts]` is how a Python function becomes a `command` on PATH after install.

items.title: pip & requirements.txt
items.description: Pip reads `[build-system]`, installs the backend, and produces wheels from `pyproject.toml`.

items.title: Lockfiles & Reproducibility
items.description: `pyproject.toml` declares abstract deps; lockfiles pin exact versions for reproducible installs.
